  "findings": [
    "Thermal growth offset was ignored during shaft alignment on hot service equipment.",
    "Operating alignment is out of tolerance due to thermal expansion, causing high vibration and stress on bearings and couplings."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the equipment to prevent catastrophic coupling or bearing failure.",
    "Perform a hot alignment check or calculate thermal growth offsets using manufacturer data or API 686 guidelines.",
    "Re-align the machine cold with the correct thermal growth target offsets applied."
  ],
  "rationale": "Ignoring thermal growth offsets on hot service machinery results in severe misalignment once the equipment reaches operating temperature. This violates API 686 standards and laser alignment manual procedures, leading to accelerated wear, high vibration, and potential premature failure of bearings, seals, and couplings.",
  "references": [
    "API 686 Chapter 4 (Machinery Alignment)",
    "Laser Alignment System Manuals (Thermal Growth Compensation)"
  ]
}
